heading: Omitted
label: 715f Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for governance of the Tribe by an Interim Council until the adoption of a new tribal constitution and bylaws, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 101–42, § 8103 Stat. 93June 28, 1989
